NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS DEMURRER TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THIS CLAIM MAKES LEGAL CONCLUSIONS. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS TO SUPPORT THIS CAUSE OF ACTION. DEFENDANTS DEMURRER TO THE 9TH, 11TH AND 12TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. THESE ARE SUFFICIENTLY PLED. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE 10 CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT ARGUES QUESTIONS OF FACT THAT ARE NOT PROPER FOR DETERMINATION ON DEMURRER. PLAINTIFF MUST FILE HER FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHIN 20 DAYS. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. (302/LMG) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; REPORTER: ARLENE HOWELL, CSR #2542

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-15-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JOHN WAI, TRUSTEE OF THE JOHN E. WAI 1981 LIVING TRUST, JOHN WAI, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA UNITED PROPERTY SERVICE, BILL HARKINS DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants demurrer to the 2nd cause of action is sustained with leave to amend. This claim makes legal conclusions. Plaintiff must plead facts to support this cause of action. Defendants Demurrer to the 9th, 11th and 12th causes of action is overruled. These are sufficiently pled. Defendants' demurrer to the 10 cause of action is overruled. Defendant argues questions of fact that are not proper for determination on demurrer. Plaintiff must file her first amended complaint within 20 days. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-15-2011 Text Ruling
